rationale: policy-impact-delta.ts exports CellDelta and computeCellDelta with the documented shape; 16 tests cover all 14 enumerated cases plus a frozen-input non-mutation test; set-equality is order-insensitive via Set comparison.

findings.summary: Test 16 (frozen inputs) also exercises deduplication semantics — exceeds AC3's mutation check by combining both invariants.
diagnosticCodeChanged uses a general code inequality, which correctly subsumes the policy_filter_unindexed remediation/regression cases described in the bead.
